mapper.sql: select c.course_id, c.course_name, c.category, c.teacher_user_id, c.teacher_name, c.campus, c.week_day, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.max_capacity, c.current_capacity, c.status, c.description, c.ai_notice, c.ai_suggestion, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, 'N' as enrolled, (select count(1) from edu_course_enrollment e where e.course_id = c.course_id) as enroll_count from edu_course c

select c.course_id, c.course_name, c.category, c.teacher_user_id, c.teacher_name, c.campus, c.week_day, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.max_capacity, c.current_capacity, c.status, c.description, c.ai_notice, c.ai_suggestion, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, (select count(1) from edu_course_enrollment e where e.course_id = c.course_id) as enroll_count
, case when exists (select 1 from edu_course_enrollment e where e.course_id = c.course_id and e.student_user_id = #{params.currentUserId}) then 'Y' else 'N' end as enrolled
, case when exists (select 1 from edu_course_enrollment e where e.course_id = c.course_id and e.parent_user_id = #{params.currentUserId}) then 'Y' else 'N' end as enrolled
, 'N' as enrolled
from edu_course c

if.test: _parameter != null and _parameter.getClass().name != 'java.lang.Long' and params.onlyMine != null and params.onlyMine and params.currentRole == 'student'

where.if: and exists (select 1 from edu_course_enrollment e where e.course_id = c.course_id and e.student_user_id = #{params.currentUserId})

if.test: _parameter != null and _parameter.getClass().name != 'java.lang.Long' and params.onlyMine != null and params.onlyMine and params.currentRole == 'parent'

where.if: and exists (select 1 from edu_course_enrollment e where e.course_id = c.course_id and e.parent_user_id = #{params.currentUserId})

mapper.select:
order by enroll_count desc, c.course_id desc
limit #{params.limitTop}
mapper.insert: insert into edu_course (course_name, category, teacher_user_id, teacher_name, campus, week_day, start_time, end_time, start_date, end_date, max_capacity, current_capacity, status, description, ai_notice, ai_suggestion, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{courseName}, #{category}, #{teacherUserId}, #{teacherName}, #{campus}, #{weekDay}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{maxCapacity}, #{currentCapacity}, #{status}, #{description}, #{aiNotice}, #{aiSuggestion}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update edu_course set ai_notice = #{aiNotice}, update_time = sysdate() where course_id = #{courseId}
update edu_course set ai_suggestion = #{aiSuggestion}, update_time = sysdate() where course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.delete:
delete from edu_course where course_id in
#{courseId}
mapper.select: select count(distinct teacher_user_id) from edu_course where status = '0'
